# datadog_scorecard_rule (Resource)

Provides a Datadog Scorecard Rule resource. This can be used to create and manage scorecard rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "datadog_scorecard_rule" "example" {
  name           = "Has a README"
  scorecard_name = "Service Maturity"
  description    = "Checks if the service has a README file."
  enabled        = true
  level          = "1"
  owner          = "my-team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `level` (String) The maturity level of the rule. Valid values are `1`, `2`, `3`.
- `name` (String) Name of the rule.
- `scorecard_name` (String) Name of the scorecard this rule belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `owner` (String) Owner of the rule.

### Read-Only

- `custom` (Boolean) Whether the rule is a custom rule.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import datadog_scorecard_rule.example <rule-id>
```
